title: Living in Boulder vlog 4 - 28 - 2017: Roman fucking Timeline bitches

enrichment.summary: Kyle records a late-night vlog (4:23 AM) recapping April 28th, which he spent almost entirely coding and designing an HTML Roman history timeline website. He briefly visited his mom to help with her back, then returned to work on linking king entries between horizontal and vertical views, troubleshooting table layout issues in Dreamweaver, and planning color backgrounds by dynasty era. He mentions getting high while working and finding it enhances his engagement with Roman history.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: excited and optimistic; believes it will look really cool when finished, estimates another week or two

stances.topic: getting high while working on the timeline
stances.position: enjoys it and plans to do more; finds it fun and makes looking at the project feel rewarding
feels he has been learning a lot and experiences quantum jumps in knowledge when viewing it from new angles
